name: swiss-rav
description: Browser-automation plugin for Swiss job seekers. Handles work effort logging, monthly AvP forms, incapacity reporting, document uploads, and unemployment benefit applications on job-room.ch. Includes a pension buy-in guide for tech layoffs with high severance. Run /rav:setup once to configure for your canton and ALK.

plugins.name: rav
plugins.description: Automate your Swiss RAV obligations on job-room.ch — requires Playwright MCP.
